title: n8n Docker: Backup n8n data volume
body: docker run --rm -v n8n_data:/data -v $(pwd):/backup alpine tar czf /backup/n8n-data-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d).tar.gz -C /data .
description: Create compressed backup of n8n data volume - includes workflows, credentials, logs (docs.n8n.io/hosting/installation/docker/)
